name: Lihong Qin
background: Mr. Lihong Qin is our co-founder and has served as our director and our president since our inception. Prior to joining us, Mr. Qin served as chief marketing officer and executive director of Longfor Properties Co., Ltd. from 2008 to 2014. He also served as deputy general manager of Anhui Chery Automobile Sales Co., Ltd. from 2005 to 2008 and worked at Roland Berger Strategy Consultants as a senior consultant and project manager from 2003 to 2005.
